viewContainer.title: AI Review
config.title: AI Review
config.enabled.description: Enable automatic AI reviews for the current repository.
config.cli.description: Which AI CLI should be used for the review.
config.trigger.commit: Run after a commit is detected.
config.trigger.push: Run after a push is detected.
config.trigger.commitAndPush: Run after both commit and push.
config.trigger.manual: Only run when the manual command is used.
config.model.description: Default model name. Leave empty to use the CLI default. Examples: Copilot `gpt-5.4`, Codex `gpt-5.4`, Claude `sonnet`.
config.smallChangeModel.description: Lightweight model to use when the changed line count is below the threshold. Leave empty to always use the default model. Examples: Copilot `gpt-4.1-mini`, Codex `gpt-4.1-mini`, Claude `haiku`.
config.smallChangeLineThreshold.descript: Use the lightweight model when the changed line count is below this value.
config.promptFile.description: Prompt file path. Relative paths are resolved from the repository root. The prompt may use `$commit$`, `$commit_range$`, `$trigger$`, and `$repo$` tokens.
config.reviewDirectory.description: Folder where generated review files are written. Relative paths are resolved from the repository root.
config.keepReviewFileCount.description: How many generated review files to keep in the review folder.
config.startNotificationMode.description: How the start notification should behave when a review begins.
config.startNotificationMode.progress: Show a loading notification for the full review duration.
config.startNotificationMode.brief: Show a short start notification that disappears automatically.
config.completionNotificationMode.descri: How the completion notification should behave when a review ends.
config.completionNotificationMode.sticky: Show a normal notification that stays until dismissed.
config.completionNotificationMode.brief: Show a short completion notification that disappears automatically.
config.skipCommitKeywords.description: If any configured keyword appears in the commit message, the review is skipped.
config.claudeArgs.description: Extra arguments to pass to the `claude` CLI. Required flags (`--permission-mode dontAsk -p ... --model ...`) are added automatically.
config.codexArgs.description: Extra arguments to pass to the `codex` CLI. Required flags (`-a never --model ...`) are added automatically.
config.copilotArgs.description: Extra arguments to pass to the `copilot` CLI. Required flags (`--no-ask-user --model ...`) are added automatically.
